caption: Just catching some golden hour magic right by the marina 💛 The breeze is doing something to my hair and the way the light hits my skin is everything ✨ Feeling so free and confident in this little outfit, loving how the fabric moves with me 🌊🔥 Nothing feels quite like a spontaneous moment like this. Spring is really coming back! 🌸✨ #GoldenHourVibes #SummerStyle #EffortlessGlam #MarinaLife #SunnyDays #InfluencerLife
